text: I feel an electric curiosity swelling inside me as I move through these modern, almost futuristic corridors. The cool, vivid light and the clean design spark thoughts about the intersection of art and knowledge—the creative energy of research and development. Seeing my own reflection in the glass, I am both participant and observer, aware that each step is part of some unfolding experiment. Here, there is both a sense of playful purpose and existential wonder—a liminal space where innovation quietly sits with contemplation, inviting me to question, to marvel, and to hesitate at the boundary of understanding.
